seed_text: There is one mind common to all individual men. Every man is an inlet to the same and to all of the same
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
- smell of petrichor after a long drought
- elastic stretch between two strangers' lives
- a humming frequency that gets louder if you count the seams
- something always falling apart, then snaps back together
- a gold leaf texture, easily chipped
dan_extract:
here, a dull ache behind a popped bubble; an endless, sticky pull.

1. ONE structural motif — a gold, breathable mesh that covers everything
2. ONE tension or pressure point — a humming sound right before the power goes out

here, a dull ache behind a popped bubble.
claim_status: NO_CLAIM
